Note: general information, not professional advice — talk to us for your specific case.

slides.label: BUSTED
slides.image_prompt: noir scene of a crumpled fake rent receipt under a hard desk lamp
slides.headline: The fake rent receipt trap

slides.label: REAL TALK
slides.headline: A ₹8,000 fake receipt can cost you ₹40,000.

slides.label: MYTH vs FACT
slides.myth: I can claim HRA with a receipt from a relative and never get caught.
slides.truth: The dept cross-checks PAN, rent above ₹1L/yr needs the landlord's PAN, and bogus claims trigger notices + penalty.

slides.label: THE NUMBERS
slides.body: Penalty on under-reported income for a false claim — on top of the tax and interest you still owe.

slides.label: HOW IT UNRAVELS
slides.image_prompt: a tax notice envelope on a doormat, tense morning light
slides.headline: It starts with one mismatched PAN
slides.caption: Automated checks flag it months later.

slides.headline: Tax stress? Talk to us.
slides.body: GST from ₹600 · ITR from ₹999 · 100% on-time · Vadodara
